items.name: ✨Halloween Haunted Bat Wing Dress-Orange
items.description:
✨Halloween Haunted Bat Wing Dress-Orange

Transform into a mystical Halloween enchantress with this spooky avatar costume! Featuring bat wing shoulder armor, a glowing ghost choker, and magical gothic patterns, this dress is perfect for Halloween roleplay or spooky parties. The sharp details and glowing accents make it ideal for a dark mage, witch queen, or haunted duchess look.
